title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal
summary_full: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.
summary_public: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully
